content.rendered:
Today, AMD announced the launch of their AMD Ryzen™ Threadripper™ Processors. AMI Aptio®V UEFI firmware is the reference BIOS on the AMD Ryzen™ Threadripper™ Processors and AMD EPYC™ 7000 Series data center processors and platforms.

Here are some of our customer’s motherboards:

  • ASRock X399 Taichi
  • ASUS ROG ZENITH EXTREME
  • GIGA-BYTE X399 AORUS Gaming 7
  • Micro-Star X399 GAMING PRO CARBON AC

In the news:

  • Engadget: AMD’s beastly 16-core Ryzen Threadripper CPU is available today
  • PC World: Ryzen Threadripper review: AMD’s monster 1950X stomps on other CPUs
  • Ars Technica: AMD Threadripper 1950X review: Better than Intel in almost every way

For full text of AMD’s press release, please read AMD Launches the Highest-Performance Desktop Processor, Ever, with Ryzen™ Threadripper™ High End Desktop Processors.

AMD, AMD Ryzen, Threadripper and AMD EPYC are trademarks of Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. in the United States and other countries.
